basics.name: Kendrick Sin
basics.label: AI Solutions Strategist & Business Technical Lead
basics.summary: AI Solutions Strategist and Business Technical Lead with a proven track record of bridging the gap between enterprise business needs and hands-on AI deployment. Specialized in enabling business users to safely, sustainably, and reliably adopt AI agentic solutions — including MCP Agent frameworks — by identifying process gaps and driving end-to-end implementation. Combines deep GTM strategy and enterprise deal-making experience with technical credibility in AI product governance, POC delivery, and open-source ecosystem development. Fluent in English, Chinese, and Thai, with a talent for building strong relationships across cultural boundaries.

work.name: Alibaba Cloud Thailand
work.summary: Drive AI business development and technical strategy for enterprise clients across Thailand and Southeast Asia
highlights: Engineered and executed the GTM strategy for AI distribution in the Thailand market, achieving 3-digit growth in regional adoption since 2024
Structured and negotiated multi-year AI transformation roadmaps and commercial agreements for Tier-1 enterprise clients, securing long-term recurring revenue and strategic partnerships
Scaled the local developer community for the Qwen AI ecosystem; authored and maintained open-source repositories that democratize AI implementation for non-technical stakeholders
Led high-stakes Proof of Concept (POC) developments, bridging the gap between complex AI capabilities and tangible business ROI for enterprise customers

Proactively identified and resolved critical architectural bugs within the core AI product suite, ensuring seamless deployment and maintaining 99.9% reliability for mission-critical client initiatives
Acted as the primary technical-business liaison, translating local market requirements into product engineering feedback to influence the global AI roadmap

work.name: Alibaba Cloud ISV
work.summary: Led product lifecycle management and market expansion across Southeast Asia
highlights: Spearheaded the introduction of innovative Chinese technologies to the South East Asian market, managing the entire product lifecycle
Developed and executed project plans for market entry, resulting in successful launches in 3 countries within 8 months
Implemented Agile methodologies in product development, aligned product roadmap to meet customers' requirements, increasing in 300% uptake of software in local market
Balanced lean operating costs with project revenue, to answer to investors
Successfully closed deals with 5 major clients, resulting in 1200% year-over-year revenue growth

work.name: Morphosis Apps
work.summary: Led Agile development team for e-commerce application
highlights: Led an Agile development team of 20+ members in building a brand-new e-commerce application
Utilized Jira workflows to conduct Scrum processes
Ensured project kept up with timeline, while maintaining high quality standards
Implemented a requirement gathering process, reducing scope creep by 50% and improving estimation accuracy

work.name: Singapore Armed Forces
work.summary: Seconded officers from Republic of Singapore Navy to Defence Science and Technology Agency (DSTA) to managed innovation initiatives and developed technology solutions for military operations
highlights: Managed a portfolio of six organization-scale innovation projects valued at up to $5 million each
Consistently delivered two Minimum Viable Products bi-annually, with 100% progressing to full implementation
Led the development of a predictive material provisioning system, reducing inventory costs by 30% and improving supply chain efficiency
Introduced gamification elements to naval warfare training, increasing trainee engagement by 300% and introduced metric tracking for warfighting trainees

work.name: Singapore Armed Forces
work.summary: Served as naval officer in the Singapore Armed Forces

education.studyType: Bachelor of Engineering with specialization in Systems Engineering
education.additional: Two student exchange programs in Bangkok, professional Thai language training, participated in multiple volunteer engineering camps and social causes. During which also filed patent as part of Undergraduate Research Experience on Campus (URECA) program extra-curricular research program.

awards.title: John Cheung Overseas Attachment Award
awards.summary: Awarded for outstanding academic performance coupled with enriching overseas work experience during student exchange and internship at Bangkok
